programme.title: White Squall
programme.desc: A true story about a group of American teenage boys who crew a school sailing ship to gain experience, discipline, or whatever it is that their parents feel they lack.

programme.title: White Squall
programme.desc: A true story about a group of American teenage boys who crew a school sailing ship to gain experience, discipline, or whatever it is that their parents feel they lack.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: Lost In London
programme.desc: A first-of-its-kind film event which was filmed and screened live simultaneously in select cinemas around the world. The film is loosely based on Woody Harrelson's tabloid-worthy crazy London night-out resulting in him getting in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Benny & Joon
programme.desc: Johnny Depp and Mary Stuart Masterson star in this quirky romantic drama about two misfits who come together as a result of an unusual poker game. Aidan Quinn and Julianne Moore co-star.

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: In her Academy Award winning role, Cher, while waiting for her timid fiance to decide between her and his mother, falls in love with her fiance's estranged brother, a bakery worker with a love of opera and life.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: A Duke's son leads his warriors against an evil baron and tries to destroy a galaxy-wide 'spice' trade.

programme.title: Hercules in New York
programme.desc: Banished from Mount Olympus, Hercules is sent to Earth where he finds true love and becomes a bodybuilder.

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Robbie and his three college classmates decide to move their board game into the local legendary cavern.

programme.title: Sleepless
programme.desc: Don't judge a cop by his cover. Rescue. Revenge. Redemption. To get justice, sometimes you have to get brutal.

programme.title: 12 Days Of Giving
programme.desc: When Baxter Billings (David Blue - SGU Stargate Universe, Ugly Betty) wins a small fortune at his local shopping mall, he decides to become a Secret Santa to the people in his hometown. His anonymous philanthropy is contagious and soon enough the joy of giving at Christmas spreads across town. Along the way, Baxter forms a close friendship with Pamela (Ashley Jones - True Blood, The Bold and the Beautiful) and her young son Westin. He thinks he might be falling for Pamela... but there's one problem, he's already engaged! This Christmas, Baxter will have to choose between keeping promises or following his heart.

programme.title: Santa Stole Our Dog
programme.desc: A magical holiday adventure featuring original Christmas songs by Dolly Parton, and starring Golden Globe winner, Ed Asner (Elf, Up). The Whitehaven family embark on a whirlwind adventure to the North Pole when their beloved dog, Rusty, goes missing on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: It's Christmas in the charming city of York, and after the death of her mother, teenager Jules knows all she and her dad, David, really need for Christmas is love. With both struggling to cope with everyday life in the shadow of their loss, Jules, inspired by happy memories of her mum, decides to take matters into her own hands. Creating profiles for David on multiple online dating platforms without his knowledge, Jules sets out to find her dad a girlfriend and, for herself, someone with whom she can talk. But finding love is easier said than done as Jules discovers, when her plans begin to unravel with hilarious and unexpected consequences. A uniquely heartfelt festive rom-com, starring Jermey Piven (Serendipity, Entourage) and Joely Richardson (101 Dalmatians, The Patriot).

programme.title: Holidays at the Ranch
programme.desc: When city girl Kate returns to her smalltown home for the holidays, the last thing she expects is to bump into her old childhood sweetheart, Matt. Eventually agreeing to help out at his ranch, sparks soon fly, and the pair find love is in the air once again. However, as Christmas nears its end, Kate faces an impossible decision - return to her high-flying career, or follow her heart?

programme.title: The Confirmation
programme.desc: Heart-warming and hilarious, this family tale stars Academy Award nominee Clive Owen (Children of Men) and Maria Bello (A History of Violence). Walt, a down-on-his luck carpenter, is tasked with entertaining his eight-year-old son Anthony. But when Walt's prized toolbox is stolen, a quiet father-and-son weekend turns into an adventure of a lifetime. This sincere story of fatherhood is a must see!

programme.title: Dark Tide
programme.desc: Halle Berry plays a traumatised shark expert who returns to deep waters one year after an almost fatal encounter with a great white shark. She battles her own fears to lead a thrill-seeking businessman on a dive into a dangerous section of water known as "Shark Alley."

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: After a tragic loss, Jessica heads back to her hometown to start over. But a man keeps showing up, and his presence is no coincidence. Trapped in the wilderness with no help in sight, Jessica must fight for survival against a psychotic predator determined to destroy her. Alone and desperate, she faces the ultimate test of strength and resilience After a tragic loss, Jessica returns to her hometown to start over. But a man keeps showing up, with dark intentions. Trapped in the wilderness, she must fight for survival against a psychotic predatoralone and without help

programme.title: Air Force One is Down
programme.desc: [EPISODE 1/2] Alistair Maclean's highly charged novel is brought to life in this tense, international thriller. When a fearless Serbian General is captured and imprisoned for war crimes, his loyal soldiers hijack Air Force One, kidnap the President of the United Stated and demand the release of their General. A hair-raising, high-altitude, wall-to-wall action-adventure.

programme.title: Final Days
programme.desc: A world in chaos, a pandemic left unchecked and humanity on the brink of extinctionThis is no time to be alone! As a deadly virus turns humanity into bloodthirsty plague carriers, its a fight for survival. Aiden (Tyler Posey - Teen Wolf) awakes to discover the world he knew overnight has become an apocalyptic nightmare. Locked in his apartment alone, he soon begins to lose all sense of time.

programme.title: One Winter Proposal
programme.desc: Cara and Megan return to the ski resort where they met Ben and Sean last winter. Find out what they have been up to this all year. (2019)

programme.title: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: A recently dumped travel writer goes on a ski getaway with her best friend and they find themselves double booked with two eligible men. When they are snowed in, love ensues, as it always does. (2018)

programme.title: Winter's Dream
programme.desc: Will Kat's return to the slopes renew her passion for skiing and finding true love? Dean Cain stars.

programme.title: Snowkissed
programme.desc: Kate is excited for the chance to interview her favourite author, but it means having to swap Manhattan for a small mountain town. Will her love for the city life change when she meets Noah? (2021)

programme.title: 40 Below And Falling
programme.desc: Kate is desperate to get to her wedding, but due to a snowstorm, she is stuck. Will the mysterious mountain man help her get to the church on time or will calamity come Kates why? (2015)

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Jessica Tucker, a widow and successful doctor, is trying to juggle work and family when she learns she's up for the top job at the hospital.

programme.title: Love In Wolf Creek
programme.desc: On the verge of losing her wildlife refuge, Sam, along with the town's handsome newcomer, Austin, risk it all to save an injured white wolf.

programme.title: Love at Sunset Terrace
programme.desc: Tired of her fast-paced life in the city, Sophie Carter travels to a small seaside town to disconnect and self-reflect, staying at an Airbnb run by a widowed father of a young girl.

programme.title: Little Manhattan
programme.desc: Little Manhattan is a feel-good comedy that's perfect for kids and adults alike. In a city known for excitement, two young friends are about to embark on the greatest adventure of all.

programme.title: Christmas In Wolf Creek
programme.desc: When the reindeer and star of the holiday play goes missing, new couple Sam and Austin set out to save Christmas—and their relationship.

programme.title: Christmas on Mistletoe Lake
programme.desc: Reilly finds herself in the magical town of Mistletoe Lake. She accepts the offer of Ray to stay in his boat, helping him renovate for the town's Christmas Harbor Festival. Reilly embarks on a journey to save the towns she fell in love with.

programme.title: Ill Be Homeless for Christmas
programme.desc: When a petty thief learns that his latest mark is a struggling single mother who works at a homeless shelter, he decides to use his savvy street smarts to make this Christmas one to remember for her and her young son.

programme.title: Christmas Wish
programme.desc: When Paula chose Gary over Nick, 15 years later she'd be married, with tons of debt. At Christmas, when Nick reappears, now a rich, successful art broker. A little Christmas magic and she is transported to the life with Nick.

programme.title: Mr Morgans Last Love
programme.desc: He's a widower in Paris who speaks no French. She's a dance instructor less than half his age. Can they become a family, or will his estranged adult children halt the friendship?

programme.title: Dancing Through Christmas
programme.desc: OLIVIA is picked to run the Christmas recital of The Nutcracker. When a video of Michael practising ballet with Lily goes viral, Olivia sees how much dance really means to the community. Will Olivia be able to save her dance studio with Michael's help?

programme.title: Love Across Time
programme.desc: While inspecting an old British manor for its real estate potential, Chelsea discovers a portal through time that connects with the late 1700s owner of the property. When an accident occurs, the gentleman comes through and gets stuck in the present day.

programme.title: Mary 4 Mayor
programme.desc: Running for mayor against her incumbent mayor father, an eighteen-year-old young woman learns valuable life lessons that not only are the building blocks to saving her family, but also the town she lives in.

programme.title: Romance In The Air
programme.desc: After learning her marketing job is on the line, Eden returns to Lake Tahoe where she used to spend her summers growing up. Intending to relax and recharge so she can tackle her job again, she is surprised to find her childhood friend and sweetheart Riley is still living next door. She finds purpose in helping Riley propel his struggling hot air balloon tour company, and also finds herself drawn to him and their dear past. However, Eden sees Riley and Tahoe as temporary, while her life—and boyfriend—back home await her. She can't admit that she and Riley could have a future, even if that's exactly what she wants. When she's willing to take a risk for what her heart wants, her life will take off with her true love.

programme.title: Cinderella in the Caribbean
programme.desc: Ashlyn Vanderbilt travels with her stepmother Miriam and her fiancé Bruce for their destination wedding. Although Ashlyn finds friendship and love with Bruce's son, Noah, she struggles to have her happily ever after when she discovers that her stepfamily plans to ruin Bruce.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Romance
programme.desc: Actress Emma Hutton is determined to help find her friend Hope a perfect match but in doing so, she accidentally tramples on several hearts. When Emma realizes she herself has always loved her good friend Gray, Emma learns love works best when she doesn't meddle with it. A charming romance inspired by Jane Austen's "Emma."

programme.title: Psycho Yoga Instructor
programme.desc: Justine Grace is desperate to sort out her life, her marriage to her husband Tom.

programme.title: Soccer Mom Madam
programme.desc: Post-breakup, Anna starts working at her cousin's massage parlor.

programme.title: Bridget/Daryl/Ryan B. and John
programme.desc: A new series that tells the stories of people who faced life-threatening events.

programme.title: Secret Lives of Second Wives
programme.desc: Lynn Bartlett is a successful attorney and she falls in love with Jack Hughes.

programme.title: Psycho Yoga Instructor
programme.desc: Justine Grace is desperate to sort out her life, her marriage to her husband Tom.

programme.title: The Perfect Soulmate
programme.desc: A poet with an abusive husband reaches out to a fan for help, only to find an even more dangerous companion.

programme.title: WWJD What Would Jesus Do?
programme.desc: A group of Americans - a singer, a newspaper editor, a pastor and a real estate mogul - vow to walk in the steps of Jesus. Every day, every decision becomes a turning point in their lives as they must ask themselves "What Would Jesus Do?"

programme.title: The Love Club: Lauren
programme.desc: Lauren faces divorce papers but has a feeling that it's not quite over, so she asks the Love Club for help.

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Widowed doctor Jessica vacations in Fiji with her daughter and finds love with resort owner Will.

programme.title: Mommy Would Never Hurt You
programme.desc: Riley wants to rebuild her bond with her mom and sick sister, but uncovers a secret that changes everything.

programme.title: Maid In Manhattan
programme.desc: A woman (Lopez) takes a job as a chambermaid at a luxury hotel in New York. She meets and falls in love with a debonair heir to an America political dynasty (Fiennes), who mistakes her for a society woman. When her real identity is revealed, the truth sets in about the disparity of their lives.

programme.title: Are We There Yet? (2005)
programme.desc: Ice Cube plays Nick, a playboy bachelor and sports memorabilia collector who dates a divorced mother of two young kids who never like the men their mom dates. Things go awry when Nick offers to drive the kids from Portland to Vancouver where their mother is stuck for work.

programme.title: Are We Done Yet?
programme.desc: A family leaves the big city for a fixer-upper in the 'burbs, but their investment quickly turns from a dream into a nightmare.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: From the director of Step Brothers and Talladega Nights comes this utterly hilarious action-comedy starring comedy favorites Will Ferrell and Mark Wahlberg as two New York City desk cops who take a chance to step up their game and solve a huge crime.

programme.title: Bonanza Compilation Episodes 40, 41, 42
programme.desc: The Wild West adventures of Ben Cartwright and his sons as they run and defend their Nevada ranch while helping the surrounding community.

programme.title: The Southerner
programme.desc: The life of the poor Tucker family, that worked as cotton pluggers and decided to get their own ground, but nature is against them.

programme.title: Ramon the Mexican
programme.desc: Ramon avenges his brother's murder and kills the Baxter Family.

programme.title: The Great Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: A blind man wants to get his mitts on a crooks' gold. He can't do it alone, so he hires the quartet of soldiers-of-fortune to help him.

programme.title: Something Big
programme.desc: A man kidnaps the wife of a cavalry commander in order to exchange her for a Gatling gun that's being sold by a gun runner.

programme.title: Passionate Summer
programme.desc: An idealistic young schoolmaster arrives at a Jamaican boarding school.

programme.title: The Divorce of Lady X
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier plays Logan, a divorce lawyer, stranded in overcrowded hotel.

programme.title: Press for Time
programme.desc: When Norman Shields lands a job at the Tinmouth Times, he creates complete havoc, particularly when reporting on the local beauty contest! Starring Norman Wisdom, playing four different characters, and featuring Angela Brown and Derek Bond.

programme.title: Trouble in the Air
programme.desc: This comedy centres on the aging butler to a poor country squire. A BBC producer wants to feature the butler and squire, on his radio program. A wheeler-dealer tries to buy the squires land for less than it is worth.

programme.title: The Private Life of Henry VIII
programme.desc: In this oscar winning performace, Charles Laughton plays Henry VIII.

programme.title: Cart
programme.desc: Temporary women workers as docile as a lamb lock arms together against mighty money.

programme.title: Cheese in the Trap
programme.desc: Hong Seol has seen it so long, that creepy and icy cold attitude of Yoo Jung. However, the current Yoo Jung is completely different. He comes up to Hong Seol with a smile on his faceacting like a gentleman asking her if she wants to date with him. Seeing his entirely different manner,Hong Seol is wondering what he is up to.Original Story by: Based on 1.1 Billionview web comics

programme.title: How to steal a dog
programme.desc: Ji-so, a young girl who doesn't have a house because of her bankrupted dad. In order to get money to buy a house she plan to steals wealthy people's dogs to earn reward money when she returns them.

programme.title: Best Mistake 1 : The Movie
programme.desc: Kim Yeon Do (Lee Eun Jae) is a studious high school girl whose life is being made miserable by a boy from her past. Despite all of her efforts, she can't get peace as he won't leave her alone. So she hatches a plan. On her social media pages, she posts a picture of another boy, in the hope that this move will put an end to the irritation. But this move turns out to have unexpected consequences: It turns out that the boy in the picture is actually one of her schoolmates. Named Ji Hyun Ho (Kang Yul), he is a bit of a loose cannon. Although he is very popular, he dislikes studying - and prefers play. The rest of the school soon learns about the social media post, as news spreads fast in the classroom! This leads to a number of run-ins with ji Hyun Ho. But the more they get to know one another, the closer they get - causing yet further complications for a whole host of classmates!

programme.title: SWITCH
programme.desc: Top celeb Kang wakes up in a new life: married to first love with twins—while his ex-manager is now the star!

programme.title: 71: Into The Fire
programme.desc: A story of 71 student soldiers who bravely fought against the North Korean army during the Korean War.

programme.title: The Exclusive
programme.desc: Mu-hyuk's false article on a serial killer makes him famous but his cover-up traps him in a web of lies.

programme.title: Night of The Undead (Dubbed)
programme.desc: So-hee marries a perfect man. One day she suspects that he isn't as he seems and hires a private detective.

programme.title: The Fountain
programme.desc: Two immortally linked souls transcend the boundaries of time and space, one desperately searching for the answers that will save the other, and deliver the promise of eternal life.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: In the future, a man with access to people's memories finds his life at risk when he discovers a dark secret.

programme.title: Reunited at Christmas
programme.desc: (2018) Christmas romance with Nikki DeLoach. When Sam's fractured family gathers for one last Christmas at her late grandmother's home, will reviving lost festive traditions lead to second chances?

programme.title: Love Always Santa
programme.desc: A struggling writer finds inspiration, and possibly romance, when he finds a letter to Santa from a woman asking for her lonely mother to find love again. Stars Marguerite Moreau, Mike Faiola (2016)

programme.title: Christmas Connection
programme.desc: A flight attendant's Christmas plans unravel when she is asked to look after an unaccompanied minor. Will she accept an invitation to spend Christmas with the young girl and her father? (2018)

programme.title: A Christmas Reunion
programme.desc: (2015) Romance starring Denise Richards and Patrick Muldoon. A high-flying executive inherits half of her aunt's bakery, but when she meets the co-owner, will it be a recipe for disaster or romance?

programme.title: Fixing Up Christmas
programme.desc: (2021) Deck the halls with Natalie Dreyfuss. When a workaholic executive hires a festive fixer for his family's company Christmas party, sparks fly, ornaments drop and love comes down the chimney.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: Set in New Orleans, this is the story of a mysterious man, Nick Easter. Nick gets himself not only on the jury of a landmark case against a gun manufacturer, but as the foreman, in an attempt to influence the other jury members to vote a certain way.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Vantage Point
programme.desc: Seen from seven different perspectives, the President of the United States - who's really a body double of the prez - is shot during a speech in Madrid, while the real President (in a nearby hotel) is kidnapped by terrorists. Figuring out the terrorists' diversionary tactics and stunned by the betrayal of a fellow American agent, a skittish but brave Secret Service Agent tracks the terrorist leader to find the real president.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: Tears of the Sun
programme.desc: After a West African president's family is assassinated and civil unrest is rampant, a top secret team is deployed to the far reaches of the jungle to rescue a U.S. doctor who is acting as a missionary. She insists the U.S. forces rescue all of her charges. As a result, the group falls under rebel attacks when it is revealed that the son of the deposed West African president is among those being saved.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, and the rest, who live on a ruined Earth.

programme.title: The War Below
programme.desc: During World War I, a group of British miners are recruited to tunnel underneath no man's land and set bombs from below the German front in hopes of breaking the deadly stalemate of the Battle of Messines.

programme.title: Where hands touch
programme.desc: In 1944, a 15-year-old girl, daughter of a white German mother and a black African father, meets a member of the Hitler Youth. They become bound by the realization of the horrors being committed around them.

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: Lady Rose (Vanessa Redgrave) is an elderly woman who has lived in a hospital for over 50 years. Despite her bleak surroundings there is a light in her eyes that cannot be extinguished. Dr. Stephen Grene (Eric Bana) is drawn to her, compelled to discover her past and help gain her freedom.

programme.title: Magic Beyond Words
programme.desc: An inspiring look at JK Rowling's rise to become one of the most influential writers-from her humble beginnings, as an imaginative young girl and awkward teenager, to the loss of her mother and the genesis of the Harry Potter phenomenon.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: It's a race for survival in the criminal underworld of New York in the action-packed thriller TRACERS.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A thriller centered on a young man who sets out to uncover the truth about his life after finding his baby photo on a missing persons website.
